baseline.source: mission-control control-plane benchmark, outer snapshot cache miss with inner caches cleared
baseline.measurementMethod: Average wall-clock time across 5 runs after clearing repo snapshot, git snapshot, and static-surface caches before each run

result.source: mission-control control-plane benchmark, outer snapshot cache miss with inner caches warmed
result.measurementMethod: Average wall-clock time across 5 runs after clearing only the outer repo-snapshot cache while preserving warmed git/static inner caches

environment.note: This proof measures outer repo-snapshot cache misses with the new inner git/static caches warmed. It does not claim that a fully cold repo scan was reduced to the same number.
